missing_input: Spatial-temporal arrays aligned to the flood/depth target grid and horizon.
needed_for: SWE momentum and continuity residuals need aligned velocities, fluxes, discharge, or momentum-like transport fields.
recommended_recovery_action: Export aligned u/v, qx/qy, discharge, or flux fields from the hydrodynamic model.
notes: Repository mentions exist, but current local export lacks verified aligned data.

missing_input: Explicit numeric dx and dy, or a documented spatial resolution/cell size for the model grid.
needed_for: Finite-difference residuals require physical grid spacing in x and y directions.
recommended_recovery_action: Recover physical cell size or dx/dy metadata for the 128x128 grid.
notes: Repository mentions exist, but current local export lacks verified aligned data.

missing_input: Explicit numeric dt or documented temporal cadence aligned to flood/depth sequences.
needed_for: Temporal derivative terms require a physical timestep.
recommended_recovery_action: Recover physical timestep/cadence for flood and rainfall sequences.
notes: Repository mentions exist, but current local export lacks verified aligned data.

missing_input: Boundary masks plus boundary condition values or typed open-boundary metadata aligned to the grid/time axis.
needed_for: Residual constraints need boundary treatment and, for open boundaries, flow or stage conditions.
recommended_recovery_action: Export boundary masks plus inflow/outflow/stage/open-boundary values.
notes: Repository mentions exist, but current local export lacks verified aligned data.

missing_input: Aligned rainfall and other source/sink arrays or documented zeros/closures for missing terms.
needed_for: Continuity residuals need source/sink terms such as rainfall, infiltration, drainage, or lateral exchange.
recommended_recovery_action: Export rainfall plus infiltration, drainage/sewer/outfall, lateral, and evaporation terms or explicit closures.
notes: Supports Level 4+ proxy diagnostics only; not enough for Level 5 SWE residual closure.

missing_input: Pump/gate operation schedules, station discharge, or explicit evidence that none are required.
needed_for: Controlled infrastructure can dominate local fluxes and must be represented if present in the hydrodynamic system.
recommended_recovery_action: Export pump/gate/sluice station operations or document that no controlled infrastructure is represented.
notes: Repository mentions exist, but current local export lacks verified aligned data.

missing_input: Water depth plus velocity/flux/momentum fields aligned to the same grid and time axis.
needed_for: SWE residuals require state variables; depth alone supports limited proxy diagnostics, not full closure.
recommended_recovery_action: Recover complete hydrodynamic state variables beyond water depth.
notes: Supports Level 4+ proxy diagnostics only; not enough for Level 5 SWE residual closure.
